test_cases_not_implemented.reason: integration review manifest tests are already exercised by the existing tests/integration/integration-compat-manifest.test.js suite (passing). No new test added to avoid duplication.

Playwright-based viewport / server-lifecycle e2e tests. The parent-project Playwright harness boots a real server and exercises the admin flow (admin-api.test.js TC-e2eAdminAdd, TC-e2eFolderScan). The specific viewport-width and reload-persistence assertions are not yet coded as standalone tests — declared as deferred test coverage (effort: medium) rather than silently missing.
Covered by tests/e2e/admin-api.test.js NFR008-style localhost guard assertions (status 403 for non-loopback) — not duplicated in the new file.

files_modified.change: Replaced 5-command dispatcher with 2-command dispatcher. Removed imports of cmdInit/cmdSetup/cmdMonitor. Removed 'init', 'setup', 'monitor' switch cases. Rewrote USAGE constant to list only 'web', 'integration review', 'help', '--version' and added a data-location hint. @aitri-trace for FR-001/US-001/AC-001/TC-001h attached.

Rewrote the empty-state branch (projects.length === 0). New panel uses class empty-state--onboarding with a h2 title 'No projects yet', body copy, primary CTA Add your first project (wired through the existing SPA pushState navigation), and a
disclosure 'What counts as a project?'. No CLI commands are mentioned. Implements FR-003.

Same empty-state rewrite as HomeView.jsx (title + body + /admin CTA + disclosure). Kept in sync with the live component even though OverviewTab is currently unused in App.jsx — see technical_debt entry TD-01.

Added CSS rules for .empty-state--onboarding, .empty-state__title, .empty-state__body, .empty-state__cta (with :hover/:focus), .empty-state__disclosure, .empty-state__disclosure summary. Reuses existing design tokens (--surface, --border, --syn-green, --syn-teal, --text, --text-dim, --space-*) — no new tokens. Applied font-weight: 500 to mitigate the known 4.3:1 contrast of --text-dim on --surface per WCAG 2.1 1.4.3 large-text rule.
Regenerated by `npm run build` with the new bundle asset hashes.
Rebuilt SPA bundle containing the new empty-state component.
Rebuilt stylesheet containing the onboarding empty-state rules.

Rewrote: removed CLI dashboard claim; added 'Quick Start' section whose only steps are `npm install` and `aitri-hub web`; replaced CLI-vs-Docker table with a single Node.js requirement (Docker demoted to DEPLOYMENT.md); rewrote commands table to the four remaining verbs; replaced the two-component ASCII diagram with a single-process diagram showing the Node server that both serves the SPA and runs the collector; removed the v0.1.64 migration note about `aitri-hub setup`.

Replaced CLI Development-Setup block (`setup`/`monitor`) with `npm install` + `aitri-hub web`. Prerequisites table now lists Docker as optional. Added a systemd unit example for production. Moved all Docker / nginx / docker-compose instructions under a new `## Optional: Docker deployment` H2 heading at the end. Clarified the localhost-only + loopback-peer guard in Security Notes.

Rewrote Business Rules and Success Criteria. Removed the phrase 'CLI terminal dashboard' and every reference to `aitri-hub monitor`/`setup`/`init`. Success criteria now frame onboarding as 'open localhost:3000 → /admin CTA → register in the browser'. Out of Scope now explicitly lists 'A terminal-resident dashboard or interactive CLI setup wizard'.

Inserted a posture note at the top of the file declaring Aitri Hub as web-only and flagging that historical entries may mention the removed CLI commands. Historical [x] implemented entries were left intact (they are a log, not current documentation).

setup_commands: npm run build   (from web/ — regenerates docker/web-dist/)

technical_debt.substitution: The Phase 2 System Design and Phase 1 UX Spec named `web/src/components/OverviewTab.jsx` as the single file to edit for the empty state, but that component was renamed to `HomeView.jsx` in the earlier `hub-mvp-web` feature and is the component actually mounted at `/` by `App.jsx`. OverviewTab.jsx is now unreferenced dead code but still lives in the tree. I edited both files so the feature intent is met on the live path, but I did not delete the unused OverviewTab.jsx in this feature (deletion is out of its declared scope).
technical_debt.reason: The spec was written against a stale file name and no refactor of the admin/navigation map was in scope for this feature. Editing only OverviewTab.jsx would have satisfied the spec literally but shipped a broken empty state; editing both satisfies the AC on the live render path.

technical_debt.substitution: BACKLOG.md historical [x] implemented entries still contain the strings `aitri-hub setup`, `aitri-hub monitor`, and `aitri-hub init` as part of the record of prior work. The FR-004 AC only grep-checks README.md, DEPLOYMENT.md, and IDEA.md (matching the parent BACKLOG-like files convention), so this is within the stated contract; however, a future full-rewrite of BACKLOG.md could scrub those strings.
technical_debt.reason: A backlog is a historical log. Rewriting closed entries would falsify the record of what was shipped and when. The posture note at the top of the file is sufficient for any reader to interpret the history correctly.

definition_of_done.linter: No lint step is configured for this repo; manual source review performed.
definition_of_done.aitri_trace_headers: Added on bin/aitri-hub.js dispatcher module header
